name: carreffour-api-tests
description: Automação de API com Postman/Newman, Playwright, relatórios e CI.

scripts.postman:test: node scripts/prepare-reports.js && newman run postman/collections/carrefour-api.postman_collection.json -e postman/environments/serverest.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,json,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/postman/postman-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/postman/postman-report.json --reporter-junit-export reports/postman/postman-report.xml
scripts.api:test:local: npm run postman:test && npm run postman:open-report
scripts.ci:api: npm run typecheck && npm run postman:test && npm test
